name: ward
description: Ward: tenant containment for agentic SaaS. Open-source, self-hostable. Phase 1 local prototype.

scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix apps/api && npm run typecheck --prefix packages/ward-sdk && npm run typecheck --prefix examples/node-express-ai-saas && npm run typecheck --prefix examples/docker-agent && npm run typecheck --prefix apps/control-room
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix apps/api && npm install --prefix packages/ward-sdk && npm install --prefix examples/node-express-ai-saas && npm install --prefix examples/docker-agent && npm install --prefix apps/control-room
